title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!
